summary: Test suite covers core matrix generation and workflow structure adequately, but has notable gaps. Unit tests are well-organized (Describe/Context/It) and test happy paths (2x2 matrices, include/exclude, max-parallel, fail-fast, size validation, feature flags). However, critical gaps exist: (1) Config file error handling (missing file, JSON parsing) untested in unit tests; (2) Parameter validation (what if maxParallel=0 or maxSize is negative?) not covered; (3) Integration tests thin—only 2 test cases with basic assertions (just checking for strings in output, not validating full JSON structure); (4) Workflow structure tests brittle—regex matching on raw YAML will break with formatting changes; (5) No tests for reserved key handling (what if 'include' used as regular dimension?); (6) Missing tests for null/empty dimension values, special characters, unicode. The integration test helper is reasonable (temp repos, git setup, act execution, output capture), but expected patterns are shallow. Unit tests would catch regressions in matrix logic; integration tests would catch workflow breakage. But JSON output format changes, config file handling errors, and parameter validation failures would likely slip through.
